title: Consultant Digital Analytics (all genders)
required_skills: Analytics tools (Piwik PRO, Matomo, Google Analytics)
bonus_skills: AI tools in digital analytics domain
matched_skills: Dashboard systems (executive dashboards, budget variance dashboards)
Marketing KPI framework design (partial match: holistic data strategy)
missing_skills: Piwik PRO / Matomo / Google Analytics (explicit tool experience)
Client-facing consulting / Beratung experience in analytics
core_responsibilities: Develop analytics strategies and individual solutions for web and app projects
Implement analytics tools including tag management, tracking, and consent management systems
Create reports and interactive dashboards; interpret results with online marketing teams
Support clients in meeting technical and legal compliance requirements (e.g. cookie compliance)
Conduct internal and external training sessions on analytics topics
recommended_emphasis: Highlight dashboard creation experience (Hapag-Lloyd, HSBC) as concrete evidence of reporting capability
Emphasise data-driven campaign analytics and campaign performance optimisation
If any exposure to GA / GTM / tag management exists, surface it explicitly
Frame marketing KPI framework design as strategic analytics consulting experience
Add any self-directed or coursework knowledge of HTML/CSS/JS to bridge technical gap
